g.text: note: Partial order: Admin > Execute > Write > Read
note: State progression: PreIdle -> Post1/Post2/Post3, then Post1 -> Post2 -> Post3
note: Owner is always in accessible set
note: Initiator must have required permission
note: Initiator must be in target.accessible
note: Pre and post states must differ
note: At least one channel must be authenticated
note: Timestamp must be ISO 8601 with millisecond precision
note: Log entry is immutable after creation
createEntry(eventType, timestamp, userId, sourceIp, outcome) : AuditLogEntry
